scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && docker-compose up -d && wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 tcp:localhost:6379 tcp:localhost:7700 --timeout 60000
scripts.dev: wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 tcp:localhost:6379 tcp:localhost:7700 --timeout 30000 && concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "yellow.bold,cyan.bold" "cd backend && npm run dev 2>&1 | tee ../backend.log" "cd frontend && npm run dev 2>&1 | tee ../frontend.log"
